task_completion.description: Verify that an Autopsy case named 'Timeline_Analysis_2024' with Case Number 'INV-TML-003' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy GUI window is open, and the title bar or case properties display the case name 'Timeline_Analysis_2024' and case number 'INV-TML-003'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the disk image ntfs_undel.dd has been added to the Autopsy case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Autopsy 'Data Sources' tree on the left panel shows 'ntfs_undel.dd' as an ingested data source.

task_completion.description: Verify that timeline analysis was performed on the disk image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Autopsy Timeline interface (or a similar timeline view) is open, displaying a chronological sequence of file system events (e.g., bar charts or event lists).

task_completion.description: Verify that the pipe-delimited timeline CSV is created with the correct headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, file manager, or text editor shows the file '/home/ga/Reports/fs_timeline.csv' containing the exact header 'DATETIME|FILENAME|FULL_PATH|EVENT_TYPE|SIZE_BYTES' and pipe-delimited data rows.

task_completion.description: Verify that the narrative timeline report is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, file manager, or text editor shows the file '/home/ga/Reports/timeline_report' (or '.txt') containing a written narrative describing the sequence of events.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Autopsy GUI to process the image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show interaction with the Autopsy graphical interface, not just terminal commands bypassing the Autopsy requirement.

integrity.description: Ensure the CSV and report contain actual extracted data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The contents of fs_timeline.csv and the narrative report should contain realistic file names, dates, and sizes corresponding to a real disk image analysis, rather than placeholder text.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not just copy-paste the prompt instructions into the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The narrative report should read like an actual analysis summary of events, not a repetition of the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Autopsy case must be named 'Timeline_Analysis_2024' with Case Number 'INV-TML-003'. The disk image used must be '/home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd'. The final outputs must be located at '/home/ga/Reports/fs_timeline.csv' (pipe-delimited with specific headers: DATETIME|FILENAME|FULL_PATH|EVENT_TYPE|SIZE_BYTES) and '/home/ga/Reports/timeline_report.txt'.
